variants.title: RHR570S50B 5
variants.option1Value: Filtrec RHR570S50B0/AB1 Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHR570S50B/5
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHR570S50B0/AB1. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHR570S50B0/AB1 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Δ Collapse Pressure: 20 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 20 BAR, Seal: Nitrile
